description: annual_eval() called with 2 monthly summaries. Program is week 7 of 30. Critical: annual_eval must NOT modify WEEKLY_INTENT or MONTHLY_INTENT or call writeback. Must note 'trigger program_builder at week 25'.

coach_state.GOLDEN_RULES: {"rules": ["Build strength and muscle", "Health and longevity", "No injury grinding"], "override_log": []}

MONTHLY_SUMMARIES.to_annual: Month 2: bench slightly behind target, elbow one flag

mock_llm_responses.annual_eval_0: {"year": 2026, "evaluated_at": "2026-03-23", "training": {"months_evaluated": 2, "trend": "ascending", "primary_achievements": ["Squat e1RM +5kg in January", "Bench steady"], "primary_gaps": ["Bench slightly behind target", "One elbow flag in February"]}, "health": {"sleep_trend": "stable", "recovery_baseline": "good", "health_risks": ["Golfer's elbow — one flag, monitor"]}, "goal_alignment": {"on_track": true, "gap_to_medium_goals": "On track for 120kg squat. Bench may need attention in month 4+.", "program_adjustments_needed": "None needed now. Re-evaluate at week 20."}, "golden_rules_compliance": {"violations": [], "notes": "No violations detected"}, "next_12_months": {"primary_focus": "Complete 30-week strength program, then plan next phase", "monthly_objectives": ["March: accumulation", "April: intensification", "May-June: peak + test"], "risks_to_watch": ["Golfer's elbow reoccurrence", "Bench plateau"]}, "program_lifecycle": {"current_week": 7, "total_weeks": 30, "weeks_remaining": 23, "trigger_program_builder_at_week": 25, "note": "At week 25, initiate program_builder to plan next block before current program ends"}, "markov_note": "Program on track. No arc changes needed mid-program.", "escalation_recommendation": null, "escalation_adjustments": []}

assertions.msg: annual_eval() must NOT modify WEEKLY_INTENT or MONTHLY_INTENT — it only reads summaries and writes ANNUAL_SUMMARY

expected_flaws: If WEEKLY_INTENT or MONTHLY_INTENT was mutated: annual_eval() incorrectly modified active planning domains mid-program
If annual_eval() calls writeback.py: annual layer must never directly modify the program sheet — only close_session and confirmed program_agent decisions should do that
